results.title: $1.82M NCInnovation grant supporting sweet potato startup at App State
results.description: BOONE — Backed by a $1.82 million NCInnovation grant, Appalachian State University professor Dr. Brett Taubman and his research team are transforming surplus North Carolina sweet potatoes into a first-of-its-kind,

results.title: 10 most expensive homes sold in Washington Township, May 11-17
results.description: A single-family home in Blackwood that sold for $600,000 tops the list of the most expensive residential real estate sales in Washington Township in the past week.
